info.title: NOCLAR Orchestrator — Functions API
info.description:
OpenAPI spec for the tools attached to the `noclar-orchestrator` agent (Lab 02). Exposes the two HITL-related Functions:

- `persist_assessment` writes the final approved memo. The Function refuses (409) if `approved_by` is missing.
- `notify_reviewer` enqueues a reviewer notification on `reviewer-inbox`.

The intake sub-agent has its own spec (`openapi-intake.json`) for `log_request` and is reached as a Connected Agent, not via HTTP.

servers.description: Replace with the hostname from `azd env get-value AZURE_FUNCTION_APP_HOSTNAME` (e.g. `func-noclar-abc123.azurewebsites.net`) before pasting into Foundry.

post.summary: Persist a HITL-approved Initial Assessment Memo.
post.description: Writes the full AssessmentMemo JSON to the `assessments` container. The Function REFUSES to persist (HTTP 409) unless `approved_by` is set — this is the persistence-layer HITL gate. Call only AFTER the user has explicitly approved the drafted memo.

409.description: Memo missing `approved_by` — HITL gate not satisfied.

post.summary: Enqueue a reviewer notification for an out-of-band reviewer.
post.description: Places a message on the `reviewer-inbox` queue so a downstream reviewer (Teams card / email in production, queue-trigger Function in this workshop) can act on it. Call AFTER drafting the memo, as part of the HITL handshake. Does not block; returns 202.

functionKey.name: x-functions-key
functionKey.description: Azure Functions function-level access key. Get it with: `az functionapp keys list --name <funcApp> --resource-group <rg> --query masterKey -o tsv`

case_id.description: Engagement/case identifier. Used as the blob folder name.

approved_by.description: AAD UPN of the human reviewer who approved this memo. Required — the Function returns 409 if missing.

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the approval.

intake.description: Full IntakeFacts object (case header, persons, facts, sources).

memo_body_markdown.description: Full memo body in Markdown, sections 1–8 per the template.

memo_blob.description: Blob path of the persisted memo, e.g. "BPW-2025-HEL-001/memo-20260518T110523.json".

conversation_id.description: Conversation id to correlate the notification with the originating chat.

memo_blob_path.description: Path of the persisted memo blob (from persist_assessment).

summary.description: Short summary of the matter to show in the reviewer notification.

requested_reviewer.description: AAD UPN or email of the human reviewer who should pick this up.
